016package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.controller;
017
018import android.os.Bundle;
019import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity;
020import androidx.navigation.NavController;
021import androidx.navigation.fragment.NavHostFragment;
022import androidx.navigation.ui.AppBarConfiguration;
023import androidx.navigation.ui.NavigationUI;
024import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
025import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.R;
026import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.databinding.ActivityMainBinding;
027
028/**
029 * Main activity for the Pixel Create application. Manages navigation between fragments
030 * using the Navigation component and handles the app bar configuration.
031 */
032@AndroidEntryPoint
033public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity {
034
035  private ActivityMainBinding binding;
036  private NavController navController;
037  private AppBarConfiguration appBarConfiguration;
038
039  @Override
040  protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
041    super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
042    binding = ActivityMainBinding.inflate(getLayoutInflater());
043    setContentView(binding.getRoot());
044    setupNavigation();
045  }
046
047  @Override
048  public boolean onSupportNavigateUp() {
049    return NavigationUI.navigateUp(navController, appBarConfiguration)
050        || super.onSupportNavigateUp();
051  }
052
053  private void setupNavigation() {
054    NavHostFragment navHostFragment = (NavHostFragment) getSupportFragmentManager()
055        .findFragmentById(R.id.nav_host_fragment);
056    //noinspection DataFlowIssue
057    navController = navHostFragment.getNavController();
058    appBarConfiguration = new AppBarConfiguration.Builder(
059        R.id.login_fragment,
060        R.id.project_gallery_fragment
061    ).build();
062    NavigationUI.setupActionBarWithNavController(this, navController, appBarConfiguration);
063  }
064
065}
